 #include "ixgbe_txrx_common.h"
 #include "devlink/devlink.h"
 
+
+/* X540 FDIR byte-swap helpers (from ixgbe_82599.c) */
+#ifndef IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE32
+#define IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE32(_value) \
+	(((u32)(_value) >> 24) | (((u32)(_value) & 0x00FF0000) >> 8) | \
+	 (((u32)(_value) & 0x0000FF00) << 8) | ((u32)(_value) << 24))
+#endif
+#ifndef IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32
+#define IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(a, reg, value) \
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG((a), (reg), IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE32(ntohl(value)))
+#endif
+#ifndef IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE16
+#define IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE16(_value) __swab16(ntohs((_value)))
+#endif
+
+static int ixgbe_gaming_fdir_check_cmd_complete(struct ixgbe_hw *hw, u32 *fdircmd)
+{
+	int i;
+	for (i = 0; i < IXGBE_FDIRCMD_CMD_POLL; i++) {
+		*fdircmd = IXGBE_READ_REG(hw, IXGBE_FDIRCMD);
+		if (!(*fdircmd & IXGBE_FDIRCMD_CMD_MASK))
+			return 0;
+		udelay(10);
+	}
+	return -EIO;
+}
+
+
+
+/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+ * Raptor Lake Hybrid Topology & Gaming ATR Helpers
+ * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+ */
+
+/* Gaming ITR Constants - Safer minimums to prevent TX hangs */
+
+/* Forward declarations for Gaming ATR */
+static int ixgbe_parse_gaming_ports(const char *ranges, u16 *ports, int max_ports);
+static void ixgbe_gaming_atr_init(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter);
+static int ixgbe_gaming_atr_program_filters(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter);
+static void ixgbe_gaming_atr_clear_filters(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter);
+static void ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_clear(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter);
+static int ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_program(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter, u16 *ports, int num_ports, u8 queue);
+static int ixgbe_gaming_fdir_program(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter, u16 *ports, int num_ports, u8 queue);
+static void ixgbe_gaming_fdir_clear(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter);
+static int ixgbe_gaming_fdir_write_filter(struct ixgbe_hw *hw, union ixgbe_atr_input *input, u16 soft_id, u8 queue, bool lli);
+
+/* Gaming ITR - low latency but safe */
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_ITR_MIN		8	/* ~16us */
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_ITR_LOW		10
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_ITR_MED		14
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_ITR_HIGH		20
+
+#ifndef IXGBE_MAX_GAMING_FILTERS
+#define IXGBE_MAX_GAMING_FILTERS 128
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_IPV4_BASE   0
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_IPV6_BASE   32
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_IPV4_MAX    64
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_IPV6_MAX    64
+struct ixgbe_gaming_filter {
+	u16 port;
+	u16 soft_id;
+	u8  ip_version;
+	bool active;
+};
+#endif
+
+/* X540 5-tuple LLI defines from datasheet */
+#define IXGBE_FTQF_5TUPLE_MASK_DPORT_PROTO	0x07
+#define IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_PRIO		7
+
+static __always_inline bool ixgbe_is_primary_thread(unsigned int cpu)
+{
+	const struct cpumask *sibs = topology_sibling_cpumask(cpu);
+	return !sibs || cpu == cpumask_first(sibs);
+}
+
+struct ixgbe_cpuid_info {
+	u32 eax;
+};
+
+static void ixgbe_query_core_type(void *info)
+{
+#ifdef CONFIG_X86
+	struct ixgbe_cpuid_info *ci = info;
+	if (cpuid_eax(0) >= 0x1A)
+		ci->eax = cpuid_eax(0x1A);
+	else
+		ci->eax = 0;
+#endif
+}
+
+static __always_inline bool ixgbe_cpu_is_pcore(unsigned int cpu)
+{
+#ifdef CONFIG_X86
+	struct ixgbe_cpuid_info ci = { .eax = 0 };
+	int err;
+	if (!cpu_online(cpu))
+		return false;
+	err = smp_call_function_single(cpu, ixgbe_query_core_type, &ci, 1);
+	if (err == 0 && ci.eax) {
+		u8 core_type = (ci.eax >> 24) & 0xFF;
+		if (core_type == 0x40)
+			return true;
+		if (core_type == 0x20)
+			return false;
+	}
+#endif
+	return ixgbe_is_primary_thread(cpu);
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_build_pcore_mask(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter,
+				  cpumask_var_t pcore_mask)
+{
+	cpumask_var_t node_cpus;
+	unsigned int cpu;
+	int node;
+	if (!zalloc_cpumask_var(&node_cpus, GFP_KERNEL))
+		return -ENOMEM;
+	node = dev_to_node(&adapter->pdev->dev);
+	if (node != NUMA_NO_NODE && node_online(node))
+		cpumask_and(node_cpus, cpumask_of_node(node), cpu_online_mask);
+	else
+		cpumask_copy(node_cpus, cpu_online_mask);
+	if (cpumask_empty(node_cpus))
+		cpumask_copy(node_cpus, cpu_online_mask);
+	cpumask_clear(pcore_mask);
+	for_each_cpu(cpu, node_cpus) {
+		if (ixgbe_cpu_is_pcore(cpu))
+			cpumask_set_cpu(cpu, pcore_mask);
+	}
+	if (cpumask_empty(pcore_mask)) {
+		for_each_cpu(cpu, node_cpus) {
+			if (ixgbe_is_primary_thread(cpu))
+				cpumask_set_cpu(cpu, pcore_mask);
+		}
+	}
+	if (cpumask_empty(pcore_mask))
+		cpumask_copy(pcore_mask, node_cpus);
+	free_cpumask_var(node_cpus);
+	return 0;
+}
+
+static unsigned int ixgbe_pick_interrupt_cpu(const struct cpumask *pcore_mask,
+					     unsigned int vector)
+{
+	unsigned int cpu, selected = nr_cpu_ids;
+	unsigned int idx = 0;
+	unsigned int target;
+	unsigned int weight;
+	weight = cpumask_weight(pcore_mask);
+	if (!weight)
+		return cpumask_first(cpu_online_mask);
+	target = vector % weight;
+	for_each_cpu(cpu, pcore_mask) {
+		if (idx++ == target) {
+			selected = cpu;
+			break;
+		}
+	}
+	if (selected < nr_cpu_ids)
+		return selected;
+	return cpumask_first(pcore_mask);
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_parse_gaming_ports(const char *ranges, u16 *ports, int max_ports)
+{
+	char *dup, *cur, *tok;
+	unsigned long *seen;
+	int count = 0;
+	bool limit_hit = false;
+	if (!ranges || !ports || max_ports <= 0)
+		return 0;
+	dup = kstrdup(ranges, GFP_KERNEL);
+	if (!dup)
+		return -ENOMEM;
+	seen = kcalloc(BITS_TO_LONGS(65536), sizeof(unsigned long), GFP_KERNEL);
+	if (!seen) {
+		kfree(dup);
+		return -ENOMEM;
+	}
+	cur = dup;
+	while ((tok = strsep(&cur, ",")) != NULL) {
+		u32 start, end;
+		char *dash;
+		strim(tok);
+		if (!*tok)
+			continue;
+		dash = strchr(tok, '-');
+		if (dash) {
+			*dash = '\0';
+			if (kstrtou32(tok, 10, &start) ||
+			    kstrtou32(dash + 1, 10, &end))
+				continue;
+		} else {
+			if (kstrtou32(tok, 10, &start))
+				continue;
+			end = start;
+		}
+		if (start == 0 || start > 65535)
+			continue;
+		if (end > 65535)
+			end = 65535;
+		if (start > end)
+			continue;
+		for (; start <= end; start++) {
+			if (test_and_set_bit(start, seen))
+				continue;
+			if (count < max_ports) {
+				ports[count++] = (u16)start;
+			} else {
+				limit_hit = true;
+				goto out;
+			}
+		}
+	}
+out:
+	if (limit_hit)
+		pr_warn("ixgbe: Gaming ATR port limit (%d) reached, remaining ignored\n", max_ports);
+	else
+		pr_info("ixgbe: Gaming ATR parsed %d ports from '%s'\n", count, ranges);
+	kfree(seen);
+	kfree(dup);
+	return count;
+}
+
+static void ixgbe_gaming_atr_init(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
+{
+	spin_lock_init(&adapter->gaming_lock);
+	spin_lock_init(&adapter->gaming_fdir_lock);
+	memset(adapter->gaming_filters, 0, sizeof(adapter->gaming_filters));
+	adapter->gaming_filter_count = 0;
+	adapter->gaming_5tuple_count = 0;
+	adapter->gaming_fdir_count = 0;
+	adapter->gaming_enabled = false;
+	adapter->gaming_atr_enabled = false;
+	adapter->gaming_queue = 0;
+}
+
+static void ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_clear(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
+{
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	int i;
+	if (!adapter->gaming_5tuple_count)
+		return;
+	for (i = 0; i < IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_MAX; i++) {
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FTQF(i), IXGBE_FTQF_POOL_MASK_EN);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_SAQF(i), 0);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_DAQF(i), 0);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_SDPQF(i), 0);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_L34T_IMIR(i), 0);
+	}
+	adapter->gaming_5tuple_count = 0;
+}
+
+static void ixgbe_gaming_fdir_clear(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
+{
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	struct ixgbe_gaming_filter old_filters[IXGBE_MAX_GAMING_FILTERS];
+	u16 old_count;
+	int i;
+	spin_lock_bh(&adapter->gaming_lock);
+	memcpy(old_filters, adapter->gaming_filters, sizeof(old_filters));
+	old_count = adapter->gaming_filter_count;
+	spin_unlock_bh(&adapter->gaming_lock);
+	if (!old_count)
+		return;
+	if (hw->mac.type < ixgbe_mac_82599EB)
+		return;
+	spin_lock(&adapter->fdir_perfect_lock);
+	for (i = 0; i < old_count; i++) {
+		struct ixgbe_gaming_filter *gf = &old_filters[i];
+		union ixgbe_atr_input input;
+		if (!gf->active)
+			continue;
+		if (gf->soft_id >= IXGBE_MAX_FDIR_INDICES)
+			continue;
+		memset(&input, 0, sizeof(input));
+		input.formatted.dst_port = cpu_to_be16(gf->port);
+		if (gf->ip_version == 4)
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_UDPV4;
+		else
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_UDPV6;
+		ixgbe_fdir_erase_perfect_filter_82599(hw, &input, gf->soft_id);
+	}
+	spin_unlock(&adapter->fdir_perfect_lock);
+}
+
+static void ixgbe_gaming_atr_clear_filters(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
+{
+	unsigned long flags;
+	spin_lock_irqsave(&adapter->gaming_lock, flags);
+	adapter->gaming_enabled = false;
+	adapter->gaming_atr_enabled = false;
+	adapter->gaming_filter_count = 0;
+	memset(adapter->gaming_filters, 0, sizeof(adapter->gaming_filters));
+	spin_unlock_irqrestore(&adapter->gaming_lock, flags);
+	spin_lock_bh(&adapter->gaming_fdir_lock);
+	adapter->gaming_filter_count = 0;
+	adapter->gaming_atr_enabled = false;
+	memset(adapter->gaming_filters, 0, sizeof(adapter->gaming_filters));
+	spin_unlock_bh(&adapter->gaming_fdir_lock);
+	ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_clear(adapter);
+	ixgbe_gaming_fdir_clear(adapter);
+	if (adapter->hw.mac.type >= ixgbe_mac_82599EB) {
+		int i;
+		for (i = 0; i < 128; i++)
+			IXGBE_WRITE_REG(&adapter->hw, IXGBE_L34T_IMIR(i), 0);
+	}
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_gaming_fdir_write_filter(struct ixgbe_hw *hw,
+					  union ixgbe_atr_input *input,
+					  u16 soft_id, u8 queue, bool lli)
+{
+	u32 fdirport, fdirvlan, fdirhash, fdircmd;
+	int err;
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(hw, IXGBE_FDIRSIPv6(0), input->formatted.src_ip[0]);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(hw, IXGBE_FDIRSIPv6(1), input->formatted.src_ip[1]);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(hw, IXGBE_FDIRSIPv6(2), input->formatted.src_ip[2]);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(hw, IXGBE_FDIRIPSA, input->formatted.src_ip[0]);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG_BE32(hw, IXGBE_FDIRIPDA, input->formatted.dst_ip[0]);
+	fdirport = be16_to_cpu(input->formatted.dst_port);
+	fdirport <<= IXGBE_FDIRPORT_DESTINATION_SHIFT;
+	fdirport |= be16_to_cpu(input->formatted.src_port);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FDIRPORT, fdirport);
+	fdirvlan = IXGBE_STORE_AS_BE16(input->formatted.flex_bytes);
+	fdirvlan <<= IXGBE_FDIRVLAN_FLEX_SHIFT;
+	fdirvlan |= ntohs(input->formatted.vlan_id);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FDIRVLAN, fdirvlan);
+	fdirhash = (__force u32)input->formatted.bkt_hash;
+	fdirhash |= soft_id << IXGBE_FDIRHASH_SIG_SW_INDEX_SHIFT;
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FDIRHASH, fdirhash);
+	IXGBE_WRITE_FLUSH(hw);
+	fdircmd = IXGBE_FDIRCMD_CMD_ADD_FLOW | IXGBE_FDIRCMD_FILTER_UPDATE |
+		  IXGBE_FDIRCMD_LAST | IXGBE_FDIRCMD_QUEUE_EN;
+	if (lli)
+		fdircmd |= IXGBE_FDIRCMD_INT;
+	fdircmd |= input->formatted.flow_type << IXGBE_FDIRCMD_FLOW_TYPE_SHIFT;
+	fdircmd |= (u32)queue << IXGBE_FDIRCMD_RX_QUEUE_SHIFT;
+	fdircmd |= (u32)input->formatted.vm_pool << IXGBE_FDIRCMD_VT_POOL_SHIFT;
+	IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FDIRCMD, fdircmd);
+	err = ixgbe_gaming_fdir_check_cmd_complete(hw, &fdircmd);
+	if (err)
+		return err;
+	return 0;
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_program(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter,
+				       u16 *ports, int num_ports, u8 queue)
+{
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	int i, programmed = 0;
+	if (hw->mac.type < ixgbe_mac_82599EB)
+		return 0;
+	if (num_ports <= 0)
+		return 0;
+	if (num_ports > IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_MAX)
+		num_ports = IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_MAX;
+	for (i = 0; i < num_ports; i++) {
+		u16 port = ports[i];
+		u32 ftqf, sdpqf, l34timir;
+		u16 port_be_swab = swab16(port);
+		ftqf = IXGBE_FTQF_POOL_MASK_EN |
+		       (IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_PRIO << IXGBE_FTQF_PRIORITY_SHIFT) |
+		       (IXGBE_FTQF_5TUPLE_MASK_DPORT_PROTO << IXGBE_FTQF_5TUPLE_MASK_SHIFT) |
+		       IXGBE_FTQF_QUEUE_ENABLE |
+		       IXGBE_FTQF_PROTOCOL_UDP;
+		sdpqf = ((u32)port_be_swab << 16);
+		l34timir = IXGBE_IMIR_LLI_EN_82599 |
+			   IXGBE_IMIR_SIZE_BP_82599 |
+			   IXGBE_IMIR_CTRL_BP_82599 |
+			   ((u32)queue << IXGBE_IMIR_RX_QUEUE_SHIFT_82599);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_SAQF(i), 0);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_DAQF(i), 0);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_SDPQF(i), sdpqf);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_FTQF(i), ftqf);
+		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_L34T_IMIR(i), l34timir);
+		programmed++;
+	}
+	adapter->gaming_5tuple_count = programmed;
+	return programmed;
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_gaming_fdir_program(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter,
+				     u16 *ports, int num_ports, u8 queue)
+{
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	union ixgbe_atr_input mask;
+	int i, ret, programmed = 0;
+	u8 ipv6_count = 0;
+	if (hw->mac.type < ixgbe_mac_82599EB)
+		return 0;
+	if (num_ports <= 0)
+		return 0;
+	if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_FDIR_HASH_CAPABLE)
+		return 0;
+	if (!hlist_empty(&adapter->fdir_filter_list))
+		return 0;
+	if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_SRIOV_ENABLED)
+		return 0;
+	if (num_ports > IXGBE_GAMING_FDIR_MAX)
+		num_ports = IXGBE_GAMING_FDIR_MAX;
+	ret = ixgbe_init_fdir_perfect_82599(hw, adapter->fdir_pballoc);
+	if (ret)
+		return ret;
+	memset(&mask, 0, sizeof(mask));
+	mask.formatted.flow_type = 0xFF;
+	mask.formatted.dst_port = cpu_to_be16(0xFFFF);
+	ret = ixgbe_fdir_set_input_mask_82599(hw, &mask);
+	if (ret)
+		return ret;
+	spin_lock(&adapter->fdir_perfect_lock);
+	spin_lock_bh(&adapter->gaming_lock);
+	for (i = 0; i < num_ports; i++) {
+		u16 port = ports[i];
+		union ixgbe_atr_input input;
+		u16 soft_id = IXGBE_GAMING_IPV6_BASE + ipv6_count;
+		if (ipv6_count >= IXGBE_GAMING_IPV6_MAX)
+			break;
+		if (adapter->gaming_filter_count >= IXGBE_MAX_GAMING_FILTERS)
+			break;
+		memset(&input, 0, sizeof(input));
+		input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_UDPV6;
+		input.formatted.dst_port = cpu_to_be16(port);
+		ixgbe_atr_compute_perfect_hash_82599(&input, &mask);
+		if (!ixgbe_gaming_fdir_write_filter(hw, &input, soft_id, queue, true)) {
+			struct ixgbe_gaming_filter *gf = &adapter->gaming_filters[adapter->gaming_filter_count++];
+			gf->port = port;
+			gf->ip_version = 6;
+			gf->soft_id = soft_id;
+			gf->active = true;
+			ipv6_count++;
+			programmed++;
+		}
+	}
+	adapter->gaming_fdir_count = ipv6_count;
+	adapter->gaming_enabled = (adapter->gaming_filter_count > 0);
+	adapter->gaming_atr_enabled = adapter->gaming_enabled;
+	spin_unlock_bh(&adapter->gaming_lock);
+	spin_unlock(&adapter->fdir_perfect_lock);
+	return programmed;
+}
+
+static int ixgbe_gaming_atr_program_filters(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
+{
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	u16 parsed_ports[IXGBE_MAX_GAMING_FILTERS];
+	int num_ports, i, ret = 0;
+	u8 queue = 0;
+	int queue_found = -ENOENT;
+	if (hw->mac.type < ixgbe_mac_82599EB)
+		return 0;
+	if (!gaming_atr_ranges || !*gaming_atr_ranges)
+		return 0;
+	if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_SRIOV_ENABLED)
+		return 0;
+	num_ports = ixgbe_parse_gaming_ports(gaming_atr_ranges, parsed_ports, ARRAY_SIZE(parsed_ports));
+	if (num_ports <= 0)
+		return num_ports;
+	ixgbe_gaming_atr_clear_filters(adapter);
+	for (i = 0; i < adapter->num_rx_queues; i++) {
+		if (!adapter->rx_ring[i])
+			continue;
+		queue = adapter->rx_ring[i]->reg_idx;
+		queue_found = 0;
+		break;
+	}
+	if (queue_found)
+		return queue_found;
+	ret = ixgbe_gaming_5tuple_program(adapter, parsed_ports,
+					  min_t(int, num_ports, IXGBE_GAMING_5TUPLE_MAX),
+					  queue);
+	if (ret < 0)
+		return ret;
+	ret = ixgbe_gaming_fdir_program(adapter, parsed_ports, num_ports, queue);
+	if (ret < 0 && adapter->gaming_5tuple_count == 0)
+		return ret;
+	adapter->gaming_queue = queue;
+	adapter->gaming_enabled = (adapter->gaming_5tuple_count + adapter->gaming_fdir_count) > 0;
+	adapter->gaming_atr_enabled = adapter->gaming_enabled;
+	pr_info("ixgbe: Gaming ATR programmed %d 5-tuple + %d FDIR (total ports %d) on queue %u\n",
+		adapter->gaming_5tuple_count, adapter->gaming_fdir_count, num_ports, queue);
+	return 0;
+}
+
+
+
 char ixgbe_driver_name[] = "ixgbe";
 static const char ixgbe_driver_string[] =
 			      "Intel(R) 10 Gigabit PCI Express Network Driver";
@@ -289,6 +795,7 @@

 	    !test_bit(__IXGBE_REMOVING, &adapter->state) &&
+	    !test_bit(__IXGBE_RESETTING, &adapter->state) &&
 	    !test_and_set_bit(__IXGBE_SERVICE_SCHED, &adapter->state))
 		queue_work(ixgbe_wq, &adapter->service_task);

 			tx_desc++;

 			}

-					       dma_unmap_addr(tx_buffer, dma),
-					       dma_unmap_len(tx_buffer, len),
-					       DMA_TO_DEVICE);
+						     dma_unmap_addr(tx_buffer, dma),
+						     dma_unmap_len(tx_buffer, len),
+						     DMA_TO_DEVICE);
 				dma_unmap_len_set(tx_buffer, len, 0);
 			}
 		}
 
-		/* move us one more past the eop_desc for start of next pkt */
 		tx_buffer++;
 		tx_desc++;
 		i++;

 		}
 
-		/* issue prefetch for next Tx descriptor */
 		prefetch(tx_desc);
-
-		/* update budget accounting */
 		budget--;
 	} while (likely(budget));
 
@@ -1449,6 +1944,7 @@

 		return !!budget;

 	if (check_for_tx_hang(tx_ring) && ixgbe_check_tx_hang(tx_ring)) {
 		if (adapter->hw.mac.type == ixgbe_mac_e610)
 			ixgbe_handle_mdd_event(adapter, tx_ring);
@@ -1459,10 +1955,7 @@
 		       "tx hang %d detected on queue %d, resetting adapter\n",
 			adapter->tx_timeout_count + 1, tx_ring->queue_index);
 
-		/* schedule immediate reset if we believe we hung */
 		ixgbe_tx_timeout_reset(adapter);
-
-		/* the adapter is about to reset, no point in enabling stuff */
 		return true;
 	}
 
@@ -1921,9 +2414,93 @@
 	skb->protocol = eth_type_trans(skb, dev);
 }
 
-void ixgbe_rx_skb(struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector,
-		  struct sk_buff *skb)
+/* Detect tiny UDP frames for direct, low-latency delivery */
+static __always_inline bool ixgbe_is_tiny_udp(const struct sk_buff *skb)
+{
+	if (skb->len > 256)
+		return false;
+
+	if (likely(skb->protocol == htons(ETH_P_IP))) {
+		const struct iphdr *iph;
+		u16 frag;
+
+		if (unlikely(skb->len < sizeof(struct iphdr)))
+			return false;
+
+		iph = (const struct iphdr *)skb->data;
+		if (unlikely(iph->version != 4 || iph->ihl < 5))
+			return false;
+
+		frag = ntohs(iph->frag_off);
+		if (unlikely(frag & (IP_MF | IP_OFFSET)))
+			return false;
+
+		return iph->protocol == IPPROTO_UDP;
+	}
+
+#if IS_ENABLED(CONFIG_IPV6)
+	if (skb->protocol == htons(ETH_P_IPV6)) {
+		const struct ipv6hdr *ip6h;
+		const u8 *ptr;
+		u8 nexthdr;
+		unsigned int offset;
+		int i;
+
+		if (unlikely(skb->len < sizeof(struct ipv6hdr)))
+			return false;
+
+		ip6h = (const struct ipv6hdr *)skb->data;
+		ptr = (const u8 *)skb->data;
+		nexthdr = ip6h->nexthdr;
+		offset = sizeof(struct ipv6hdr);
+
+		for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
+			if (nexthdr == IPPROTO_UDP)
+				return true;
+
+			if (nexthdr == IPPROTO_HOPOPTS ||
+			    nexthdr == IPPROTO_DSTOPTS ||
+			    nexthdr == IPPROTO_ROUTING) {
+				u8 hdrlen;
+				if (unlikely(skb->len < offset + 2))
+					return false;
+				/* ext hdr: first byte next, second len */
+				hdrlen = *(ptr + offset + 1);
+				nexthdr = *(ptr + offset);
+				offset += (hdrlen + 1) * 8;
+				if (unlikely(skb->len < offset))
+					return false;
+				continue;
+			}
+			if (nexthdr == IPPROTO_FRAGMENT) {
+				__be16 frag_off;
+				if (unlikely(skb->len < offset + 8))
+					return false;
+				frag_off = *(__be16 *)(ptr + offset + 2);
+				if (ntohs(frag_off) & 0xFFF8)
+					return false;
+				nexthdr = *(ptr + offset);
+				offset += 8;
+				continue;
+			}
+			/* Unknown next header, stop */
+			break;
+		}
+		return nexthdr == IPPROTO_UDP;
+	}
+#endif
+
+	return false;
+}
+
+
+void ixgbe_rx_skb(struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector, struct sk_buff *skb)
 {
+	if (gaming_mode && ixgbe_is_tiny_udp(skb)) {
+		netif_receive_skb(skb);
+		return;
+	}
+
 	napi_gro_receive(&q_vector->napi, skb);
 }

 static void ixgbe_update_itr(struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector,
 			     struct ixgbe_ring_container *ring_container)
 {

+	unsigned int itr;

-	/* If we don't have any rings just leave ourselves set for maximum
-	 * possible latency so we take ourselves out of the equation.
-	 */
-	if (!ring_container->ring)
+	if (unlikely(!ring_container->ring))
 		return;
 
-	/* If we didn't update within up to 1 - 2 jiffies we can assume
-	 * that either packets are coming in so slow there hasn't been
-	 * any work, or that there is so much work that NAPI is dealing
-	 * with interrupt moderation and we don't need to do anything.
-	 */

-		goto clear_counts;
+	if (time_before(now, ring_container->next_update))
+		return;

+	bytes = ring_container->total_bytes;
+	itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_USECS | IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
 
-	/* We have no packets to actually measure against. This means
-	 * either one of the other queues on this vector is active or
-	 * we are a Tx queue doing TSO with too high of an interrupt rate.
-	 *
-	 * When this occurs just tick up our delay by the minimum value
-	 * and hope that this extra delay will prevent us from being called
-	 * without any work on our queue.
-	 */
-	if (!packets) {

 		itr = (q_vector->itr >> 2) + IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_INC;
 		if (itr > IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MAX_USECS)
 			itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MAX_USECS;

+		goto out;
 	}
 
-	bytes = ring_container->total_bytes;
+	avg_wire_size = bytes / packets;
+
+	if (gaming_mode && avg_wire_size <= 256) {
+		/*
+		 * Keep adaptive logic in usec-scale units that ixgbe_set_itr()
+		 * later converts to hardware EITR encoding.
+		 */
+		if (packets <= 4)
+			itr = 2;
+		else if (packets <= 8)
+			itr = 4;
+		else if (packets <= 32)
+			itr = 6;
+		else
+			itr = 8;
+		itr |= IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
+		goto out;
+	}
 
-	/* If packets are less than 4 or bytes are less than 9000 assume
-	 * insufficient data to use bulk rate limiting approach. We are
-	 * likely latency driven.
-	 */
 	if (packets < 4 && bytes < 9000) {
 		itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
-		goto adjust_by_size;
+		goto adjust;
 	}
-
-	/* Between 4 and 48 we can assume that our current interrupt delay
-	 * is only slightly too low. As such we should increase it by a small
-	 * fixed amount.
-	 */
 	if (packets < 48) {

 			itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MAX_USECS;

+		goto out;
 	}
-
-	/* Between 48 and 96 is our "goldilocks" zone where we are working
-	 * out "just right". Just report that our current ITR is good for us.

 	if (packets < 96) {
 		itr = q_vector->itr >> 2;
-		goto clear_counts;
+		goto out;
 	}
-
-	/* If packet count is 96 or greater we are likely looking at a slight
-	 * overrun of the delay we want. Try halving our delay to see if that

 		itr = q_vector->itr >> 3;

 			itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_USECS;
-		goto clear_counts;
+		goto out;
 	}
-
-	/* The paths below assume we are dealing with a bulk ITR since number
-	 * of packets is 256 or greater. We are just going to have to compute

-	 * packet sizes there isn't much we can do as NAPI polling will likely
-	 * be kicking in sooner rather than later.

 	itr = IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_BULK;
 
-adjust_by_size:
-	/* If packet counts are 256 or greater we can assume we have a gross

+adjust:
+    if (avg_wire_size <= 60)

+    else if (avg_wire_size <= 316)
+        avg_wire_size = avg_wire_size * 40 + 2720;
+    else if (avg_wire_size <= 1084)
+        avg_wire_size = avg_wire_size * 15 + 11452;
+    else if (avg_wire_size < 1968)
+        avg_wire_size = avg_wire_size * 5 + 22420;

+    if (itr & IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY)

+    switch (q_vector->adapter->link_speed) {
+    case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_10GB_FULL:
+    case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_100_FULL:
+    default:
+        itr += DIV_ROUND_UP(avg_wire_size,
+                            IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_INC * 256) *
+               IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_INC;
+        break;
+    case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_2_5GB_FULL:
+    case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_1GB_FULL:
+    case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_10_FULL:

+            avg_wire_size = 8064;
+        itr += DIV_ROUND_UP(avg_wire_size,
+                            IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_INC * 64) *
+               IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_MIN_INC;
+        break;
+    }

-	 *  wmem_default / (size + overhead) = desired_pkts_per_int

-	 *

-	 * packet, (256 skb, 64 headroom, 320 shared info), we can reduce the
-	 * formula down to
-	 *
-	 *  (170 * (size + 24)) / (size + 640) = ITR
-	 *

-	 * by 8 after rounding up. We also have to account for PCIe link speed

-	} else {
-		/* plateau at a limit of 8K ints/sec */
-		avg_wire_size = 32256;
-	}
-
-	/* If we are in low latency mode half our delay which doubles the rate

-	 */
-	if (itr & IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY)
-		avg_wire_size >>= 1;
+out:
+	if (gaming_mode) {
+		unsigned int base = itr & ~IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
 
-	/* Resultant value is 256 times larger than it needs to be. This

-	case IXGBE_LINK_SPEED_100_FULL:

+			itr = 2 | (itr & IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY);
+		else if (base > 8)
+			itr = 8 | (itr & IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY);

  */
 void ixgbe_write_eitr(struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector)
 {
-	struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter = q_vector->adapter;
-	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
-	int v_idx = q_vector->v_idx;
-	u32 itr_reg = q_vector->itr & IXGBE_MAX_EITR;
+	struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter;
+	struct ixgbe_hw *hw;
+	u32 itr_reg;
+	u16 v_idx;
 
-	switch (adapter->hw.mac.type) {
+	if (unlikely(!q_vector))
+		return;
+
+	adapter = q_vector->adapter;
+	if (unlikely(!adapter))
+		return;
+
+	hw = &adapter->hw;
+	v_idx = q_vector->v_idx;
+	itr_reg = q_vector->itr & IXGBE_MAX_EITR;
+
+	switch (hw->mac.type) {
 	case ixgbe_mac_82598EB:
-		/* must write high and low 16 bits to reset counter */
-		itr_reg |= (itr_reg << 16);
+		itr_reg |= itr_reg << 16;
 		break;
 	case ixgbe_mac_82599EB:
 	case ixgbe_mac_X540:
@@ -2926,35 +3442,56 @@
 	case ixgbe_mac_x550em_a:
 	case ixgbe_mac_e610:
 		/*
-		 * set the WDIS bit to not clear the timer bits and cause an
-		 * immediate assertion of the interrupt
+		 * For low-latency gaming intervals, allow immediate timer update;
+		 * otherwise keep WDIS set for steady-state batching behavior.
 		 */
-		itr_reg |= IXGBE_EITR_CNT_WDIS;
+		if (gaming_mode && itr_reg <= 32)
+			itr_reg &= ~IXGBE_EITR_CNT_WDIS;
+		else
+			itr_reg |= IXGBE_EITR_CNT_WDIS;
 		break;
 	default:
 		break;
 	}
+
+
 	IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_EITR(v_idx), itr_reg);
 }
 
 static void ixgbe_set_itr(struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector)
 {
-	u32 new_itr;
+	u32 new_itr, rx_itr, tx_itr;
+	u16 old_itr;
+
+	if (unlikely(!q_vector))
+		return;
 
 	ixgbe_update_itr(q_vector, &q_vector->tx);
 	ixgbe_update_itr(q_vector, &q_vector->rx);
 
-	/* use the smallest value of new ITR delay calculations */
-	new_itr = min(q_vector->rx.itr, q_vector->tx.itr);
+	rx_itr = q_vector->rx.itr & ~IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
+	tx_itr = q_vector->tx.itr & ~IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
 
-	/* Clear latency flag if set, shift into correct position */
-	new_itr &= ~IXGBE_ITR_ADAPTIVE_LATENCY;
-	new_itr <<= 2;
+	/*
+	 * Gaming mode is RX-latency driven: prefer the RX target ITR unless TX
+	 * becomes materially lower, preserving responsiveness under mixed loads.
+	 */
+	if (gaming_mode)
+		new_itr = (tx_itr + 2 < rx_itr) ? tx_itr : rx_itr;
+	else
+		new_itr = min_t(u32, rx_itr, tx_itr);
 
-	if (new_itr != q_vector->itr) {
-		/* save the algorithm value here */
-		q_vector->itr = new_itr;
+	new_itr <<= 2;
 
+	/* Keep practical low-latency limits to avoid pathological extremes. */
+	if (gaming_mode)
+		new_itr = clamp_t(u32, new_itr, 8, 32);
+
+	old_itr = q_vector->itr;
+
+	if (new_itr != old_itr &&
+	    (!gaming_mode || abs((int)new_itr - (int)old_itr) >= 4)) {
+		q_vector->itr = (u16)new_itr;
 		ixgbe_write_eitr(q_vector);
 	}
 }
@@ -3646,12 +4183,27 @@
 static int ixgbe_request_msix_irqs(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
 {
 	struct net_device *netdev = adapter->netdev;
+	cpumask_var_t pcore_mask;
 	unsigned int ri = 0, ti = 0;
+	unsigned int other_cpu = nr_cpu_ids;
 	int vector, err;
+	int other = adapter->num_q_vectors; /* extra MSI-X vector slot */
+
+	if (!zalloc_cpumask_var(&pcore_mask, GFP_KERNEL))
+		return -ENOMEM;
+
+	if (ixgbe_build_pcore_mask(adapter, pcore_mask)) {
+		e_dev_warn("Failed to build P-core mask; using all online CPUs for IRQ affinity\n");
+		cpumask_copy(pcore_mask, cpu_online_mask);
+	}
+
+	if (!cpumask_empty(pcore_mask))
+		other_cpu = cpumask_first(pcore_mask);
 
 	for (vector = 0; vector < adapter->num_q_vectors; vector++) {
 		struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector = adapter->q_vector[vector];
 		struct msix_entry *entry = &adapter->msix_entries[vector];
+		unsigned int cpu;
 
 		if (q_vector->tx.ring && q_vector->rx.ring) {
 			snprintf(q_vector->name, sizeof(q_vector->name),
@@ -3664,45 +4216,71 @@
 			snprintf(q_vector->name, sizeof(q_vector->name),
 				 "%s-tx-%u", netdev->name, ti++);
 		} else {
-			/* skip this unused q_vector */
 			continue;
 		}
+
 		err = request_irq(entry->vector, &ixgbe_msix_clean_rings, 0,
 				  q_vector->name, q_vector);
 		if (err) {
-			e_err(probe, "request_irq failed for MSIX interrupt "
-			      "Error: %d\n", err);
+			e_err(probe, "request_irq failed for MSI-X vector %d: %d\n",
+			      vector, err);
 			goto free_queue_irqs;
 		}
-		/* If Flow Director is enabled, set interrupt affinity */
-		if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_FDIR_HASH_CAPABLE) {
-			/* assign the mask for this irq */
+
+		cpu = ixgbe_pick_interrupt_cpu(pcore_mask, vector);
+		cpumask_clear(&q_vector->affinity_mask);
+		if (cpu < nr_cpu_ids)
+			cpumask_set_cpu(cpu, &q_vector->affinity_mask);
+		if (cpumask_empty(&q_vector->affinity_mask))
+			cpumask_copy(&q_vector->affinity_mask, pcore_mask);
+
+		if (gaming_mode) {
+			err = irq_set_affinity_and_hint(entry->vector,
+							&q_vector->affinity_mask);
+			if (err)
+				irq_update_affinity_hint(entry->vector,
+							 &q_vector->affinity_mask);
+		} else {
 			irq_update_affinity_hint(entry->vector,
 						 &q_vector->affinity_mask);
 		}
 	}
 
-	err = request_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector,
+	err = request_irq(adapter->msix_entries[other].vector,
 			  ixgbe_msix_other, 0, netdev->name, adapter);
 	if (err) {
-		e_err(probe, "request_irq for msix_other failed: %d\n", err);
+		e_err(probe, "request_irq failed for MSI-X other vector: %d\n", err);
 		goto free_queue_irqs;
 	}
 
+	if (gaming_mode && other_cpu < nr_cpu_ids) {
+		err = irq_set_affinity_and_hint(adapter->msix_entries[other].vector,
+						cpumask_of(other_cpu));
+		if (err)
+			irq_update_affinity_hint(adapter->msix_entries[other].vector,
+						 cpumask_of(other_cpu));
+	}
+
+	free_cpumask_var(pcore_mask);
 	return 0;
 
 free_queue_irqs:
-	while (vector) {
-		vector--;
-		irq_update_affinity_hint(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector,
-					 NULL);
-		free_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector,
-			 adapter->q_vector[vector]);
+	while (vector--) {
+		struct ixgbe_q_vector *q_vector = adapter->q_vector[vector];
+		struct msix_entry *entry = &adapter->msix_entries[vector];
+
+		if (!q_vector->rx.ring && !q_vector->tx.ring)
+			continue;
+
+		irq_update_affinity_hint(entry->vector, NULL);
+		free_irq(entry->vector, q_vector);
 	}
+
 	adapter->flags &= ~IXGBE_FLAG_MSIX_ENABLED;
 	pci_disable_msix(adapter->pdev);
 	kfree(adapter->msix_entries);
 	adapter->msix_entries = NULL;
+	free_cpumask_var(pcore_mask);
 	return err;
 }
 
@@ -3827,16 +4405,14 @@

 		struct msix_entry *entry = &adapter->msix_entries[vector];
 
-		/* free only the irqs that were actually requested */
 		if (!q_vector->rx.ring && !q_vector->tx.ring)

 static inline void ixgbe_irq_disable(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
 {
-	switch (adapter->hw.mac.type) {
-	case ixgbe_mac_82598EB:
-		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(&adapter->hw, IXGBE_EIMC, ~0);
-		break;
-	case ixgbe_mac_82599EB:
-	case ixgbe_mac_X540:
-	case ixgbe_mac_X550:
-	case ixgbe_mac_X550EM_x:
-	case ixgbe_mac_x550em_a:
-	case ixgbe_mac_e610:
-		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(&adapter->hw, IXGBE_EIMC, 0xFFFF0000);
-		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(&adapter->hw, IXGBE_EIMC_EX(0), ~0);
-		IXGBE_WRITE_REG(&adapter->hw, IXGBE_EIMC_EX(1), ~0);
-		break;
-	default:
-		break;
-	}
-	IXGBE_WRITE_FLUSH(&adapter->hw);
-	if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_MSIX_ENABLED) {
-		int vector;
-
-		for (vector = 0; vector < adapter->num_q_vectors; vector++)
-			synchronize_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector);
+    struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+    int vector;
 
-		synchronize_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector++].vector);
-	} else {
-		synchronize_irq(adapter->pdev->irq);
-	}
+    switch (hw->mac.type) {
+    case ixgbe_mac_82598EB:
+        IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_EIMC, ~0U);
+        break;
+    case ixgbe_mac_82599EB:
+    case ixgbe_mac_X540:
+    case ixgbe_mac_X550:
+    case ixgbe_mac_X550EM_x:
+    case ixgbe_mac_x550em_a:
+    case ixgbe_mac_e610:
+        IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_EIMC, 0xFFFF0000U);
+        IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_EIMC_EX(0), ~0U);
+        IXGBE_WRITE_REG(hw, IXGBE_EIMC_EX(1), ~0U);
+        break;
+    default:
+        break;
+    }
+    IXGBE_WRITE_FLUSH(hw);
+
+    if (adapter->flags & IXGBE_FLAG_MSIX_ENABLED) {
+        for (vector = 0; vector < adapter->num_q_vectors; vector++)
+            synchronize_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector);
+
+        vector = adapter->num_q_vectors;
+        if (adapter->msix_entries && vector < MAX_MSIX_COUNT)
+            synchronize_irq(adapter->msix_entries[vector].vector);
+    } else {
+        synchronize_irq(adapter->pdev->irq);
+    }
 }

 static int ixgbe_check_fw_api_mismatch(struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter)
 {
 	struct ixgbe_hw *hw = &adapter->hw;
+	int err;
 
 	if (hw->mac.type != ixgbe_mac_e610)
 		return 0;
 
-	if (hw->mac.ops.get_fw_ver && hw->mac.ops.get_fw_ver(hw))
+	if (!hw->mac.ops.get_fw_ver)
 		return 0;
 
+	err = hw->mac.ops.get_fw_ver(hw);
+	if (err) {
+		e_dev_warn("Failed to read FW/NVM API version (err=%d). Skipping API mismatch check.\n",
+			   err);
+		return 0;
+	}
+
 	if (hw->api_maj_ver > IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MAJOR) {
 		e_dev_err("The driver for the device stopped because the NVM image is newer than expected. You must install the most recent version of the network driver.\n");
-
 		adapter->flags2 |= IXGBE_FLAG2_API_MISMATCH;
 		return -EOPNOTSUPP;

-		   hw->api_min_ver > IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MINOR + IXGBE_FW_API_VER_DIFF_ALLOWED) {
+	}
+
+	if (hw->api_maj_ver == IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MAJOR &&
+	    hw->api_min_ver > IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MINOR + IXGBE_FW_API_VER_DIFF_ALLOWED) {
 		e_dev_info("The driver for the device detected a newer version of the NVM image than expected. Please install the most recent version of the network driver.\n");
 		adapter->flags2 |= IXGBE_FLAG2_API_MISMATCH;
-	} else if (hw->api_maj_ver < IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MAJOR ||
-		   hw->api_min_ver < IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MINOR - IXGBE_FW_API_VER_DIFF_ALLOWED) {
+		return 0;
+	}
+
+	if (hw->api_maj_ver < IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MAJOR ||
+	    hw->api_min_ver < IXGBE_FW_API_VER_MINOR - IXGBE_FW_API_VER_DIFF_ALLOWED) {
 		e_dev_info("The driver for the device detected an older version of the NVM image than expected. Please update the NVM image.\n");
 		adapter->flags2 |= IXGBE_FLAG2_API_MISMATCH;

-#define IXGBE_SET_FLAG(_input, _flag, _result) \
-	((_flag <= _result) ? \
-	 ((u32)(_input & _flag) * (_result / _flag)) : \
-	 ((u32)(_input & _flag) / (_flag / _result)))

-static u32 ixgbe_tx_cmd_type(struct sk_buff *skb, u32 tx_flags)
-{
-	/* set type for advanced descriptor with frame checksum insertion */
-	u32 cmd_type = IXGBE_ADVTXD_DTYP_DATA |
-		       IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_DEXT |
-		       IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_IFCS;
-
-	/* set HW vlan bit if vlan is present */
-	cmd_type |= IXGBE_SET_FLAG(tx_flags, IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_HW_VLAN,
-				   IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_VLE);

-	/* set segmentation enable bits for TSO/FSO */
-	cmd_type |= IXGBE_SET_FLAG(tx_flags, IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_TSO,
-				   IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_TSE);
-
-	/* set timestamp bit if present */
-	cmd_type |= IXGBE_SET_FLAG(tx_flags, IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_TSTAMP,
-				   IXGBE_ADVTXD_MAC_TSTAMP);
+static inline u32 ixgbe_tx_cmd_type(const struct sk_buff *skb, u32 tx_flags)
+{
+	/* Base command: data descriptor with extension + insert FCS */
+	u32 cmd = IXGBE_ADVTXD_DTYP_DATA | IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_DEXT | IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_IFCS;
 
-	/* insert frame checksum */
-	cmd_type ^= IXGBE_SET_FLAG(skb->no_fcs, 1, IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_IFCS);
+	if (tx_flags & IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_HW_VLAN)
+		cmd |= IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_VLE;
+	if (tx_flags & IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_TSO)
+		cmd |= IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_TSE;
+	if (tx_flags & IXGBE_TX_FLAGS_TSTAMP)
+		cmd |= IXGBE_ADVTXD_MAC_TSTAMP;
+
+	/* Disable FCS insertion if requested (unlikely) */
+	if (unlikely(skb->no_fcs))
+		cmd &= ~IXGBE_ADVTXD_DCMD_IFCS;
 
-	return cmd_type;
+	return cmd;
 }

+		struct iphdr *ipv4 = (struct iphdr *)network_hdr;
+		if (ipv4->protocol == IPPROTO_UDP) {
+			struct ixgbe_adapter *adapter = q_vector->adapter;
+
+			if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < network_hdr + vxlan_headroom(0)))
+				return;
+
+			struct udphdr *uh = (struct udphdr *)(network_hdr + (ipv4->ihl << 2));
+			if ((adapter->vxlan_port && uh->dest == adapter->vxlan_port) ||
+			    (adapter->geneve_port && uh->dest == adapter->geneve_port))
+				network_hdr = skb_inner_network_header(skb);
+		}
+	}
+

+	struct iphdr *ipv4 = (struct iphdr *)network_hdr;
+	if (likely(ipv4->version == 4)) {
+		unsigned int hlen = ipv4->ihl << 2;

-			     vxlan_headroom(0)))
+		if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < network_hdr + hlen))
 			return;
 
-		/* verify the port is recognized as VXLAN */
-		if (adapter->vxlan_port &&
-		    udp_hdr(skb)->dest == adapter->vxlan_port)
-			hdr.network = skb_inner_network_header(skb);
+		if (ipv4->protocol == IPPROTO_TCP) {
+			if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < network_hdr + hlen + sizeof(struct tcphdr)))
+				return;
+			struct tcphdr *th = (struct tcphdr *)(network_hdr + hlen);
+			if (th->fin) return;
 
-		if (adapter->geneve_port &&
-		    udp_hdr(skb)->dest == adapter->geneve_port)
-			hdr.network = skb_inner_network_header(skb);
-	}
+			ring->atr_count++;
+			if (!th->syn && (ring->atr_count < ring->atr_sample_rate)) return;
 
-	/* Make sure we have at least [minimum IPv4 header + TCP]
-	 * or [IPv6 header] bytes
-	 */
-	if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < hdr.network + 40))
-		return;
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_TCPV4;
+			common.port.src ^= th->dest;
+			common.port.dst ^= th->source;
+		} else if (ipv4->protocol == IPPROTO_UDP) {
+			if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < network_hdr + hlen + sizeof(struct udphdr)))
+				return;
+			struct udphdr *uh = (struct udphdr *)(network_hdr + hlen);
 
-	/* Currently only IPv4/IPv6 with TCP is supported */
-	switch (hdr.ipv4->version) {
-	case IPVERSION:
-		/* access ihl as u8 to avoid unaligned access on ia64 */
-		hlen = (hdr.network[0] & 0x0F) << 2;
-		l4_proto = hdr.ipv4->protocol;
-		break;
-	case 6:
-		hlen = hdr.network - skb->data;
-		l4_proto = ipv6_find_hdr(skb, &hlen, IPPROTO_TCP, NULL, NULL);
-		hlen -= hdr.network - skb->data;
-		break;
-	default:
-		return;
-	}
+			ring->atr_count++;
+			if (ring->atr_count < (ring->atr_sample_rate / 4 ? : 1)) return;
 
-	if (l4_proto != IPPROTO_TCP)
-		return;
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_UDPV4;
+			common.port.src ^= uh->dest;
+			common.port.dst ^= uh->source;
+		} else {
+			return;
+		}
+		common.ip ^= ipv4->saddr ^ ipv4->daddr;
 
-	if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < hdr.network +
-		     hlen + sizeof(struct tcphdr)))
-		return;
+	} else if (ipv4->version == 6) {
+		unsigned int hlen = network_hdr - skb->data;
+		int l4_proto = ipv6_find_hdr(skb, &hlen, -1, NULL, NULL);
+		void *l4_hdr;
 
-	th = (struct tcphdr *)(hdr.network + hlen);
+		if (l4_proto != IPPROTO_TCP && l4_proto != IPPROTO_UDP)
+			return;
 
-	/* skip this packet since the socket is closing */
-	if (th->fin)
-		return;
+		l4_hdr = skb->data + hlen;
+		if (unlikely(skb_tail_pointer(skb) < (unsigned char *)l4_hdr +
+		    (l4_proto == IPPROTO_TCP ? sizeof(struct tcphdr) : sizeof(struct udphdr))))
+			return;
 
-	/* sample on all syn packets or once every atr sample count */
-	if (!th->syn && (ring->atr_count < ring->atr_sample_rate))
+		if (l4_proto == IPPROTO_TCP) {
+			struct tcphdr *th = (struct tcphdr *)l4_hdr;
+			if (th->fin) return;
+
+			ring->atr_count++;
+			if (!th->syn && (ring->atr_count < ring->atr_sample_rate)) return;
+
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_TCPV6;
+			common.port.src ^= th->dest;
+			common.port.dst ^= th->source;
+		} else {
+			struct udphdr *uh = (struct udphdr *)l4_hdr;
+			ring->atr_count++;
+			if (ring->atr_count < (ring->atr_sample_rate / 4 ? : 1)) return;
+
+			input.formatted.flow_type = IXGBE_ATR_FLOW_TYPE_UDPV6;
+			common.port.src ^= uh->dest;
+			common.port.dst ^= uh->source;
+		}
+
+		struct ipv6hdr *ipv6 = (struct ipv6hdr *)network_hdr;
+		common.ip ^= ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[0] ^ ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[1] ^
+			     ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[2] ^ ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[3] ^
+			     ipv6->daddr.s6_addr32[0] ^ ipv6->daddr.s6_addr32[1] ^
+			     ipv6->daddr.s6_addr32[2] ^ ipv6->daddr.s6_addr32[3];
+	} else {
 		return;
+	}
 
-	/* reset sample count */
 	ring->atr_count = 0;
-

-
-	/*
-	 * src and dst are inverted, think how the receiver sees them
-	 *
-	 * The input is broken into two sections, a non-compressed section
-	 * containing vm_pool, vlan_id, and flow_type.  The rest of the data
-	 * is XORed together and stored in the compressed dword.

+		common.port.src ^= first->protocol;

-			     hdr.ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[1] ^
-			     hdr.ipv6->saddr.s6_addr32[2] ^

 #define IXGBE_EITR_ITR_INT_MASK 0x00000FF8
 #define IXGBE_EITR_LLI_MOD      0x00008000
 #define IXGBE_EITR_CNT_WDIS     0x80000000
+
+#ifndef IXGBE_DCA_RXCTRL_ENABLE
+#define IXGBE_DCA_RXCTRL_ENABLE 0x00000100
+#endif
+#ifndef IXGBE_TXDCTL_WTHRESH_MASK
+#define IXGBE_TXDCTL_WTHRESH_MASK (0x1F << 16)
+#define IXGBE_TXDCTL_WTHRESH_SHIFT 16
+#endif
+
 #define IXGBE_IVAR(_i)  (0x00900 + ((_i) * 4)) /* 24 at 0x900-0x960 */
 #define IXGBE_IVAR_MISC 0x00A00 /* misc MSI-X interrupt causes */
 #define IXGBE_EITRSEL   0x00894
